case_title: FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. VS. MANUEL L RODRIGUEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATION PURSUANT TO C.C.P. 395(B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MANUEL L DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-05-2013

COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $.00 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. SERVED FEB-11-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MANUEL L
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SUTTER COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $3,597.82 AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MANUEL L

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIA CARD SERVICES, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MANUEL L $6,902.11 PRINCIPAL, $299.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,201.61, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SUTTER COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MANUEL L
